calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-29-2021 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-08-2021 Continued To Nov-29-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Yuji Mitani, via ZOOM, for Hideko Kuriyama and Hisakazu Kurahashi, Co-
Administrators; John Boessenecker, via ZOOM, for W.C. Cox, Petitioner.

The court begins by asking Mr. Boessenecker if he has any objection to the proposed allocation of expenses. Mr. Boessenecker advises that he does not believe that he has seen any documents regarding the preceding. Mr. Mitani advises that the request was in his supplement and amendment filed on Oct-20-2021. Mr. Boessenecker admits having received several documents electronically and will need some time to review them before he can determine how to proceed. The court then summarizes the Examiner's notes and advises Mr. Boessenecker that he should consider them prior to the next calling of this matter. Mr. Boessenecker advises that wiring money to the heirs and writing a check made payable to Hoerner Bank should resolve two issues noted by the Examiner. Mr. Mitani advises that his intent was to send a check to Mr. Boessenecker. The court then confirms with Mr. Boessenecker that he has the limited power of attorney to receive payment on his client's behalf. The court instructs the parties that it will be continuing this matter to Nov-29-2021 and instructs Mr. Boessenecker to file any objections Nov-15-2021.

The Accounting Petition is continued to Nov-29-2021 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-18-2021 Continued To Nov-08-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Sep-14-2021 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-30-2021 Continued To Oct-18-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Yuji Mitani, via CourtCall, for Masuo Ito, Personal Representative.

The court begins by asking Mr. Mitani regarding the pending papers from the court's tentative ruling in June. Mr. Mitani reports that he has had to go to six (6) different banks to open accounts and in the process, has had to obtain updated letters of administration. Mr. Mitani then reports that he did not receive all bank statements until August and intends to file an amended petition to address the remaining issues. Mr. Mitani advises that he expects to have an amended petition filed with the court by this week but asks for additional time to serve the amended petition on parties located out of the country.

The accounting petition is continued to 10/18/2021 at 9:00 am in in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-02-2021 Continued To Aug-30-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-28-2021 Continued To Aug-02-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Inheritance Rights
Off Calendar Jun-16-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Boessenecker, via ZOOM, counsel for W.C. Cox & Co., Petitioner; Yuji Mitani, via ZOOM, counsel for Hideko Kuriyama and Hisakazu Kurahashi, co-Administrators.

The court confirms at the outset that Mr. Mitani is not appearing to object to the Petition. Both counsel and court discuss the petition. Mr. Boessenecker then advises the court that it appears as though Mr. Mitani has yet to add him to his service list as he has not been served with notice of hearing, and requests to be properly served. Mr. Mitani is advised by the court to add Mr. Boessenecker to his service list in this matter, moving forward.

The Petition to Determine Inheritance Rights is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
